title: Select A Container Location To View Tote Details
summary: Use the Container Selection screen to select a location and view the associated box icon and tote number.
when_to_use: Use when viewing the Container Selection screen and you need to identify or confirm the tote associated with a selected location. The source states that selecting a location shows a box icon and the tote number.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to assume additional container details beyond the box icon and tote number unless they are shown on the source screen.
Do not use this procedure as navigation guidance to reach the Container Selection screen; the source does not provide the navigation path or exact control names.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Container Selection screen, select the desired location, and confirm whether the box icon and tote number are displayed.

safety_notes: Use only the viewing and selection behavior supported by the source.
Do not infer or act on unsupported controls or additional container metadata not shown in the source evidence.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Container Selection screen

access_required: Access to the Container Selection screen
system_preconditions: The Container Selection screen is available for viewing.
A selectable location is present on the screen.

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Container Selection screen and source-supported behavior that selecting a location shows a box icon and tote number.

steps.title: View the Container Selection screen
steps.purpose: Access the screen where location selection behavior is shown.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Container Selection screen.
steps.expected_result: The Container Selection screen is visible and available for location selection.
steps.healthy_condition: The Container Selection screen is displayed.
steps.failure_condition: The Container Selection screen is not visible or cannot be accessed from the current workflow.

actions.label: View Container Selection screen
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Container Selection screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Container Selection screen with selectable locations or positions.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or seek support if the Container Selection screen is not available.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR shows 'Container Selection' and describes selecting a location to show a box icon and tote number, with rack or AGV location information.
Training video frame showing the OptiSweep container selection view.

steps.title: Select the desired location
steps.purpose: Trigger the display of tote information for the chosen location.
steps.instruction: Select the desired location on the Container Selection screen.
steps.expected_result: The system accepts the location selection.
steps.healthy_condition: The selected location is highlighted or otherwise treated as the active selection.
steps.failure_condition: The location cannot be selected or the selection does not produce the expected display behavior.

actions.label: Select location
actions.exact_action: Select the desired location on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Selectable location on the Container Selection screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate or seek support if selecting a location does not show the expected box icon or tote number.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR shows 'If you select it, a box icon will show as well as the tote number.'

steps.title: Confirm the box icon appears
steps.purpose: Verify that the selected location is showing the expected visual indicator.
steps.instruction: Observe whether a box icon appears after the selection.
steps.expected_result: A box icon appears for the selected location.
steps.healthy_condition: The box icon is visible after the location is selected.
steps.failure_condition: No box icon appears after selecting the location.

actions.label: Check for box icon
actions.exact_action: Observe whether a box icon appears after the selection.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Source frame showing the box icon displayed after a location is selected.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate or seek support if the box icon does not appear after selecting a location.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR shows 'If you select it, a box icon will show as well as the tote number.'
Artifact retrieval text states that selecting a location shows a box icon and the tote number.

steps.title: Read the tote number
steps.purpose: Identify the tote associated with the selected location.
steps.instruction: Read the tote number shown for the selected location.
steps.expected_result: The tote number for the selected location is visible and can be read.
steps.healthy_condition: A tote number is displayed together with the selected location result.
steps.failure_condition: The tote number is not shown or cannot be read.

actions.label: Read tote number
actions.exact_action: Read the tote number shown for the selected location.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Displayed tote number associated with the selected location.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate or seek support if the tote number does not appear after selecting a location.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR shows 'If you select it, a box icon will show as well as the tote number.'

steps.title: Use the displayed location and tote information for confirmation
steps.purpose: Apply the displayed result for identification or confirmation without inferring unsupported details.
steps.instruction: Use the displayed tote number and selected location information for identification or confirmation.
steps.expected_result: The operator has the selected location and tote number available for confirmation.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator can identify the selected location and its displayed tote number.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed information is incomplete or insufficient for confirmation.

actions.label: Confirm displayed information
actions.exact_action: Use the displayed tote number and selected location information for identification or confirmation.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Selected location result showing the box icon and tote number.

stop_or_escalate_if: Do not proceed based on assumed details beyond the box icon and tote number unless they are shown in the source-supported screen.
Escalate or seek support if the displayed information does not match the expected selected location result.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR shows 'If you select it, a box icon will show as well as the tote number.'

success_criteria: A location is selected on the Container Selection screen.
A box icon appears for the selected location.
The tote number associated with the selected location is displayed and readable.
healthy_conditions: The Container Selection screen is visible.
Selecting a location causes the expected box icon to appear.
The tote number is shown for the selected location.
failure_conditions: The Container Selection screen cannot be viewed.
Selecting a location does not show the expected box icon.
Selecting a location does not show the tote number.
Additional details are needed but are not shown in the source-supported screen.
escalation_guidance: Escalate or seek support if selecting a location does not show the expected box icon or tote number.
Do not assume additional container details beyond the box icon and tote number unless they are shown in the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Container Selection screen showing selectable locations and the source-supported display of a box icon and tote number after selection.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: OCR shows 'If you select it, a box icon will show as well as the tote number.'

missing_details: The source does not specify the navigation path to open the Container Selection screen.
The source does not provide exact control names for the selectable location.
The source does not define what to do beyond seeking support if the box icon or tote number does not appear.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing this procedure.
The source does not specify whether production stop or LOTO is required.
